mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_reports (review_id, reporter_id, reason) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{reporterId}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT rr.id, rr.review_id AS reviewId, rr.reporter_id AS reporterId, u.nickname AS reporterNickname, r.content AS reviewContent, n.id AS novelId, n.title AS novelTitle, g.name AS novelGenre, n.description AS novelDescription, rr.reason, rr.created_at AS createdAt FROM review_reports rr LEFT JOIN users u ON rr.reporter_id = u.id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON rr.review_id = r.id LEFT JOIN novels n ON r.novel_id = n.id LEFT JOIN genres g ON n.genre_id = g.id ORDER BY rr.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
